trace_method_enabled.description: WSTG-CONF-06 -- TRACE method enabled -- echoes request headers back, classic XST (Cross-Site Tracing) chain for cookie theft when combined with XSS on a non-HttpOnly cookie context

probes.description: TRACE request to root -- 200 with X-Custom-Test: swktest-{{marker}} echoed in body = TRACE enabled. Combine with credential-leak via reflection.

options_reveals_dangerous_verbs.description: WSTG-CONF-06 -- OPTIONS response Allow header reveals PUT/DELETE/PATCH/PROPFIND/MKCOL on a route that should be GET-only (WebDAV residue, dev framework left in prod)

probes.description: Inspect OPTIONS response Allow header for PUT/DELETE/PATCH/PROPFIND/MKCOL/COPY/MOVE on resource paths -- presence suggests WebDAV or unintended REST verb
Allow header advertises DELETE on a non-API resource
Allow header advertises WebDAV verbs (PROPFIND, MKCOL, COPY, MOVE) -- WebDAV module enabled, often unintentionally

put_writes_arbitrary_file.description: WSTG-CONF-06 -- PUT method actually accepts a body and writes to the path (WebDAV write, S3-style mis-config, dev framework debug)

probes.description: PUT /swktest-{{marker}}.txt with small body -- 200/201/204 followed by GET returning the same body = write succeeded. Critical: pivot to .jsp/.aspx/.php with executable content.

delete_method_succeeds_anonymously.description: WSTG-CONF-06 -- DELETE method on a resource path succeeds without auth -- DoS / data destruction chain

probes.description: Issue DELETE against a discovered resource path (test asset only) -- 200/204 with no auth challenge = unauthenticated delete

verb_tampering_bypass_acl.description: WSTG-INPV-03 -- ACL enforced only on GET/POST. Switching to a verb the deny rule doesn't list (HEAD, PURGE, BREW, custom) returns the protected resource

probes.description: HEAD request to a route returning 401/403 on GET -- 200 = ACL only checks GET. Confirm body via OPTIONS then exploit via HEAD (no body) or custom verb.
